game.title: Lingo.ai: That’s My Lingo
game.shortDescription: Tap into a language-powered arcade prototype where every play earns XP toward Crown drops.
game.longDescription: Lingo.ai: That’s My Lingo is the browser game surface of the Lingo Legacy OS. Players tap the Lingo core, score XP, share results, and enter the pathway for premium missions, Crown drops, and future GDevelop-powered gameplay.
game.ageRatingTarget: Everyone / family-friendly pending final content review

socialShareCopy: That’s My Lingo. I just scored XP in Lingo.ai — play it in your browser.
Tap the Lingo core, earn XP, unlock the next Crown drop.
Lingo.ai is live: browser play, score sharing, and premium missions loading.
